vulnerability.reference: Over-reliance on SAE tools by developers without independent verification of feature attributions.
vulnerability.generated: Lack of ground-truth validation for cross-modal SAE features makes researchers susceptible to misinterpreting model behavior.

impact.reference: Deployment of unsafe MLLMs in high-stakes domains due to false confidence in audited reasoning.
impact.generated: Flawed alignment and deployment of MLLMs with persistent cross-modal biases and hallucinations in visual QA systems.

dose_response.reference: Incomplete SAE feature decompositions obscure cross-modal interactions, enabling developers to trust misleading visual QA explanations, which leads to deployment of unsafe MLLMs in high-stakes domains.
dose_response.generated: Sparse autoencoders producing misleading feature decompositions of MLLM representations, when used by researchers to audit visual QA, trigger misinterpretation from absent cross-modal ground-truth validation, leading to flawed alignment and persistent biases and hallucinations.
